title: Smart Choice Poop Holder and Degradable Bags, Black, 0.177999 kg, 5-count
features: A fast, safe and hygenic way of dog waste disposal
With handles to make tying the knot easier on everyone
description: Product Description These environmentally friendly bags offer a fast, safe and hygienic way of dog waste disposal. 5 Refill rolls/ 75 degradable bags in total. The Smart Choice poop bags are affordable, save on waste (no need for double bagging) and allow you to enjoy your walks without the horror that is a leaking or split doggy poo bag. Box Contains 1 x Smart Choice Poop Holder & Degradable Bags 5 Rolls, Black
